description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in Aman Ninja Forms Views – Display & Edit Ninja Forms Submissions on your site frontend views-for-ninja-forms allows Blind SQL Injection.This issue affects Ninja Forms Views – Display & Edit Ninja Forms Submissions on your site frontend: from n/a through <= 3.3.2.

product.name: Ninja Forms Views – Display & Edit Ninja Forms Submissions on your site frontend
